title: Harden sessions, history and reload behavior
goals: Keep Django as the owner of chat history.
Handle actor token expiry and page reload predictably.
non_goals: Do not move persistence to CopilotKit hosted services.
Do not change unrelated chat data models without separate ADR or task packet.
acceptance: A new CopilotKit chat maps to a clean Django session or explicit session selection.
Page reload does not silently merge unrelated conversations.
Expired actor token produces a recoverable UI error or refresh path.
